title: penstemon cyaneus
intro: Penstemon cyaneus, also known as the Blue Foxglove Penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and tubular shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Penstemon cyaneus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
